channel.title: AI Daily Update
channel.description: Daily high-signal AI intelligence digest. Updated every morning at 8 AM.

item.title: Claude Mythos Leaked - Unprecedented Cybersecurity Risk
item.description: Anthropic most powerful model yet leaked. Step change beyond Opus 4.6 with higher scores in coding, reasoning and cybersecurity benchmarks.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 - 1M Token Context, 33 Percent Fewer Hallucinations
item.description: GPT-5.4 with 1 million token context, 83 percent on GDPval. Mini and Nano variants followed March 17.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: NVIDIA Rubin Platform and Groq 3 LPU - 35x Throughput Leap
item.description: 6 new chips and 128-LPU Groq 3 rack. 35x throughput per megawatt. AWS, Google Cloud, Azure deploy first H2 2026.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: Tool Spotlight: Claude Computer Use - Autonomous Desktop Agent
item.description: Claude autonomously controls your desktop for multi-step tasks including booking, file management, and form filling.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: White House National AI Policy Framework
item.description: 7-pillar blueprint pushing federal preemption of state AI laws and industry-led standards over new regulatory bodies.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: Anthropic Eyes October IPO
item.description: Weighing going public as soon as Q4 2026 amid record Claude subscriber growth driven by Super Bowl campaigns and Claude Code.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Live Doubles Context - 750M Users
item.description: Memory import from competitor AIs, Personal Intelligence free for U.S. users, Lyria 3 Pro for 3-min AI music.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: Microsoft Walks Back Copilot Bloat on Windows 11
item.description: Scaling back Copilot in Photos, Notepad, and Snipping Tool to focus on high-value use cases.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: 72 Percent of Global 2000 Now Run AI Agents in Production
item.description: Decisive shift from pilot to deployment. Agentic AI market heading to 94.9 billion in 2026. Customer service and finance lead.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update

item.title: Anthropic Wins Pentagon Injunction
item.description: Federal judge reverses DoD blacklisting of Claude models, citing First Amendment retaliation.
item.dc:creator: AI Daily Update
